name: X-Golf Downers Grove
about: X-Golf Downers Grove offers a state-of-the-art indoor golf simulator experience, utilizing advanced camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors for unparalleled accuracy and realism. The facility combines virtual reality gaming, food and beverages, competitions, golf lessons, and social events in a dedicated kiosk system. It provides an all-encompassing golfing entertainment experience with a relaxed, welcoming atmosphere suitable for players of all ages and skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced simulator technology with high accuracy for realistic play
On-site food and beverages available in a sports bar setting
Variety of services including lessons, leagues, and event hosting

food_and_drink.notes: Food available at the venue; catering services also available for events

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players typically bring their own clubs, though rentals may be available; it's recommended to contact the venue directly.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and beverages are available for purchase on-site, and outside food is likely not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A full round is estimated to take approximately 45 minutes per player.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf Downers Grove has a welcoming atmosphere suitable for players of all ages, including children.
